input_schema.description: Cat photographs to rank by temporal specificity — how precisely each is locked to a single fleeting instant.

items.description: A cat photograph to evaluate for temporal specificity.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: A single cat photograph to evaluate for individuality and particularity.

output.$starlark: [x / sum(output) if sum(output) > 0 else 1.0 / len(output) for x in output]

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

description: Ranks cat photographs by moment authenticity — how strongly each image feels like a real, fleeting instant captured from a cat's life rather than a generic record. Evaluates temporal specificity, individuality and particularity, and narrative presence to surface images where the moment feels most immediate and alive.

input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by the moment authenticity captured in each image.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for moment authenticity.
